Public transport options, including buses and autos, are easily accessible, enhancing the overall convenience of this prime location.

resultList.dtldesc: Enter the world of luxury with this luxurious 2 BHK apartment for sale at Godrej Golf Links, The Crest, Pari Chowk, Greater Noida. Situated in a stunning golf-themed township, this residence presents a perfect mix of sophistication, comfort, and modern facilities. Property Specifications Welcome to a life of luxury and comfort in this well-appointed 2 BHK apartment on the 12th floor of a 20-storey building. With a super area of 1450 sq ft, this flat presents an optimally designed layout, contemporary interiors, and luxurious finishes, making it perfect for families as well as investors. The apartment has a well-lit and spacious living-cum-dining room that leads to a golf-facing balcony providing uninterrupted green views. The two well-appointed bedrooms are equipped with beds and wardrobes. Both the bedrooms have attached western bathrooms, each equipped with a geyser for your comfort. The modular kitchen has a chimney, piped gas connection, and a built-in utility area for increased convenience. Luxurious marble flooring covers the entire house, which adds to its upscale appeal. The apartment is north-east facing, which provides natural light and a positive energy throughout the day. As for furniture, the flat is complete with sofa sets, beds, wardrobes, and geysers. The interior design is carefully planned to provide every inch of space, comfort, and usability. Facilities This apartment also offers a covered car parking, 24-hour water supply, 100 power backup and robust security with guards and CCTV surveillance. The building has four high-speed lifts for hassle-free access to your floor. You get access to world-class amenities including a clubhouse, gym, swimming pool, indoor games, outdoor sports area, and a kids play zone. Locality The project is situated right behind Jaypee Greens and well-linked to the nearest metro station just 500 metres away, so travel throughout Delhi-NCR is fast and convenient. All day-to-day requirements and services are within reach. Schools, malls, supermarkets and shops are within 1 to 2 km. Hospitals are just 1 km away, so medical assistance is always at hand. Banks, ATMs, and public transport are also readily available in the vicinity.
